ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_position_detail" TEXT /* More detailed position (e.g., Fly-half, Center) */,
  "player_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the club */,
  "player_contract_expiry" TEXT /* Date the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the club */,
  "club_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the club was founded */,
  "club_website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  "club_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the club */,
  "club_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "club_stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the club's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_league" TEXT /* Name of the league for the season */,
  "season_division" TEXT /* Division of the league for the season */,
  "season_sponsor" TEXT /* Main sponsor of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Number of appearances */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Number of starts */,
  "substitutions" INTEGER /* Number of substitutions */,
  "tries" INTEGER /* Number of tries scored */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals kicked */,
  "drops" INTEGER /* Number of drop goals */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries sustained during the season */,
  "penalties_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of penalties conceded */,
  "penalties_converted" INTEGER /* Number of penalties converted */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for defenders and goalkeepers) */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed */,
  "pass_accuracy" TEXT /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "match_score" TEXT /* Final score of the match */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "match_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., League, Cup, Friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_performance" (
  "match_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Whether the player started the match */,
  "sub" INTEGER /* Whether the player was substituted */,
  "try" INTEGER /* Number of tries scored in the match */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Number of goals kicked in the match */,
  "drop_goal" INTEGER /* Number of drop goals scored in the match */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received in the match */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries sustained in the match */,
  "penalties_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of penalties conceded in the match */,
  "penalties_converted" INTEGER /* Number of penalties converted in the match */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made in the match */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made in the match */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed in the match */,
  "pass_accuracy" TEXT /* Pass accuracy percentage in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "user_access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
